name: Jay Dean

contactInfo.office: Texas Capitol Extension, Room E2.412, Austin, TX 78701

bio: Jay Dean represents House District 7 in the Texas House of Representatives, covering the Longview area including Gregg and Upshur counties. He has served in the Texas Legislature since 2019 and focuses on property rights, local control, and supporting East Texas industry and energy production.
campaignPromises: Lower property taxes for East Texas homeowners
Protect private property rights and oppose eminent domain abuse
Support East Texas oil and gas industry
Improve rural broadband access in East Texas
Strengthen border security through state-level action
